Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.release

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.release
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.cfd
CFD source-term handoff schemas and exporters for safety dispersion studies.
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion
Gas dispersion and exposure screening models for process-safety consequence analysis.
neqsim.process.safety.release
Source term generation for consequence modeling.
neqsim.process.safety.rupture
Trapped-liquid fire rupture screening for blocked-in process piping segments.
neqsim.process.safety.scenario
Automatic scenario generation for safety analysis.
